evidence.snippet: The largest Military & Aerospace Connector Manufacturerin the world.

Amphenol’s harsh-environment connectors deliver dependable performance for drivetrain control, onboard computing, and sensor arrays and are highly ruggedized to maintain power and signal integrity through shock, dust, and debris.

items.notes: Core product is electrical/electromechanical connectors and interconnect systems (circular, rectangular, hermetic, EMI filter) supplied as components into UAV/UGV/USV/UUV platforms.

Ruggedized CTF Media Converters, Ethernet Switches, and High Speed/High Density Connectors -- HDMI, 40GBaseT, 10GBaseT, DVI, SDI, and other protocols.

items.notes: Ruggedized Ethernet switches, media converters, fiber optic connectors and cable assemblies explicitly marketed for UAV/UGV/USV data connectivity.
DC-DC and AC-DC power supplies, VITA 62 VPX power solutions, and high-power connectors marketed for unmanned platforms.

products_categories.notes: Amphenol Aerospace is fundamentally a connector/interconnect component manufacturer. None of the 15 categories maps perfectly to 'electrical connectors'; mechanical_subsystems (cable carriers, custom mechanisms) is the closest available bucket for their core connector product. Communications is secondary for their Ethernet switches, media converters, and fiber optic products. Power_systems is secondary for their DC-DC/AC-DC power supply portfolio.

evidence.snippet: Amphenol’s harsh-environment connectors deliver dependable performance for drivetrain control, onboard computing, and sensor arrays and are highly ruggedized to maintain power and signal integrity through shock, dust, and debris.
Amphenol Aerospace, a Division of Amphenol Corporation, is one of the largest manufacturers of interconnect products in the world for the Military, Commercial Aerospace and Industrial markets.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures electrical connectors, cable assemblies, Ethernet switches, fiber optic products, and power supplies used as components in UAV/UGV/USV/UUV platforms. Dedicated Unmanned Systems market page confirms UXV-specific targeting.

evidence.snippet: Our newest connector line. D38999 performance, but 20% smaller and 50% lighter. Standard mil-spec interfaces. No special tooling or accessories needed. Stop compromising, use Series Five!

tagline: Mil-spec and high-speed connectors, power products, and fiber-optic assemblies for aerospace and unmanned systems. AS9100-certified production facility in Sidney, NY; explicit UAS market focus but NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Public evidence confirms aerospace-grade connector portfolio; gaps remain on specific UAS program wins and defense industrial compliance standing.
